info.title: AstraNull WAF Posture and Orchestrator API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for the optional AstraNull WAF posture add-on and WAF orchestrator routes. AstraNull is a no-access-first DDoS readiness validation platform: core flows do not require cloud or WAF credentials, and customer target scope is declared—not discovered as a required feature. WAF validation is safe-by-default: bounded safe checks, metadata-only evidence, rejection of raw packet/payload/header/body fields, and SOC-gated high-scale paths remain outside this add-on’s customer-runnable surface. Enable with `ASTRANULL_WAF_POSTURE_ENABLED=1`. When disabled, `/v1/waf/*` returns `404` with `waf_feature_disabled`. This artifact documents intended HTTP shapes and RBAC from `docs/backend/13-waf-posture-api-contract.md`; it is not a claim that staging/live execution, provider connectors, security observability, or release signoff gates are closed—the WAF orchestrator is not production-ready until those external gates close.

servers.description: Placeholder base URL; replace per deployment. Tenant isolation and bearer auth apply to all `/v1/waf/*` routes.

tags.name: waf-assets
tags.description: Customer-declared WAF assets and metadata. Permission `waf:read` / `waf:write`. No automatic discovery approval.

tags.name: waf-coverage
tags.description: Coverage rollups from declared assets and metadata-only posture signals. Permission `waf:read`.

tags.name: waf-validations
tags.description: Safe customer-runnable WAF validation runs. Permission `waf:run` to start; `waf:read` to list/detail. Catalog caps on requests, timeout, and concurrency; raw payload fields rejected.

tags.name: waf-orchestrator
tags.description: Validation plans and retest orchestration with safe continuation (at most one new safe `startTestRun` per tick in Postgres signed-worker mode), DB execution leases, and metadata-only `delegated_jobs`. Permission `waf:run` for mutate/execute; `waf:read` for list. Plan `completed` means all jobs delegated—not final WAF verdict closure.

tags.name: waf-reports
tags.description: Metadata-only WAF posture report exports with custody manifests. Permission `waf:read`.

tags.name: waf-cve-playbooks
tags.description: Multi-vendor CVE mitigation playbooks with coordinated safe retest. Permissions `cve_pipeline:read`, `cve_pipeline:write`, `waf:run`.

200.description: Asset with posture and related summaries (metadata-only)
Coverage rollup with ratio and trend series
Executive breakdown by declared business criticality
Tier 1-4 roadmap items with risk evidence

201.description: Plan created in safe orchestrator allowlist

200.description: Scheduled plans for operator runner / cron (externally scheduled—not in-repo daemon)

post.description: Postgres signed-worker mode: at most one new safe test run per call; may return `continuation_required: true` while `delegated_jobs` remain. Claims a DB execution lease before side effects. Does not start unmanaged DDoS traffic.
Atomically cancels eligible plans, clears execution leases, and best-effort cancels delegated safe runs via control-plane `cancelTestRun` (metadata/run cancellation only—not raw traffic generation).

get.summary: Export metadata-only WAF posture report with custody manifest
get.description: Developer-validation local export only. JSON returns `{ payload, custody }`; markdown returns redacted text with embedded custody section. No raw bodies, headers, tokens, secrets, or provider URLs.

parameters.name: drift_event_id
parameters.description: Optional filter to retests for a specific drift event

post.description: Postgres: ignores verdict-ish body fields; audits delegation when new jobs start. Safe continuation like validation plans.

post.summary: Complete retest from test-run verdict evidence
post.description: Closes retest only when delegated test runs are terminal with verdict evidence via `getTestRun`. Atomic drift transition and audit—not posture closure by itself.

get.description: Returns a metadata-only multi-vendor playbook for a CVE pipeline item with ordered vendor slices. Planned route (WAF-020); contract documented for OpenAPI parity.

post.summary: Approve CVE mitigation playbook for ticketing
post.description: Human approval gate before ticketing. Planned route (WAF-020).

post.summary: Coordinated safe retest across playbook vendor slices
post.description: Starts bounded safe retest across all assets in an approved playbook. Planned route (WAF-020).

post.summary: Create or dedupe action item from finding

bearerAuth.description: AstraNull bearer auth: OIDC JWT (`oidc-jwt`), signed-session (non-production), or service account token (`svc_…`). Effective access requires tenant isolation plus RBAC permission per route (`waf:read`, `waf:write`, `waf:run`, connector/discovery/CVE permissions on extended routes documented in the markdown contract). Developer validation may use `x-tenant-id` / `x-user-id` / `x-role` headers when `ASTRANULL_WAF_POSTURE_ENABLED=1` and auth mode allows—forbidden in production.

WafFeatureDisabled.description: WAF add-on disabled (`ASTRANULL_WAF_POSTURE_ENABLED` unset or not `1`)

PostgresOrchestratorUnavailable.description: Postgres WAF orchestrator service not injected

ApiError.description: Standard JSON error shape. Orchestrator and WAF routes fail closed on missing services, unsafe profiles, lease conflicts, and cross-tenant access.

WafAsset.description: Customer-declared WAF asset. No cloud credential required for core validation.

WafAssetPatch.description: Partial metadata only; raw payload/header/body fields are rejected.

WafDriftEvent.description: Behavior drift summaries are metadata-only (no raw HTTP bodies or packets).

WafVendorConsolidation.description: Advisory metadata only; non-prescriptive vendor consolidation overlay.

marker_profile.description: Allowlisted marker metadata; server generates nonce

probe_profile.description: Bounded safe probe profile; cannot exceed catalog maximums

probe_job.description: Signed-worker probe job metadata when applicable

max_concurrent.description: Caps assets × scenarios work queue; preflight `waf_orchestration_batch_too_large` when exceeded

WafValidationPlanCreate.description: Safe orchestrator plan body only; unsafe scenarios return `unsafe_orchestrator_plan`.

WafValidationPlan.description: `completed` indicates all planned jobs delegated—not final WAF posture or coverage closure.

metadata.description: Metadata-only delegation summary; no raw traffic payloads

continuation_required.description: True when pending delegation remains after this tick

WafRetestRequest.description: `delegated` means all retest scenarios delegated—not verdict/drift closure until `complete`.

WafActionItem.description: Deduped remediation grouping; metadata-only ticket pointers.

payload.description: Metadata-only WAF report body (kind-specific summaries; no raw traffic or secrets)

custody.description: Chain-of-custody manifest with content_sha256 over canonical JSON payload

CveMitigationPlaybook.description: Grouped multi-vendor CVE mitigation checklist (metadata only; no auto-deploy).

hostname_scope_hashes.description: Stable scope fingerprints only; no raw hostnames in tickets when redacted
